skills.purpose: Parse initiating input and identify missing details before planning begins.
Classify the run into new feature, enhancement, bug fix, or maintenance.
Score ambiguity, blast radius, and risk so autonomy remains policy-backed.
Identify reusable capabilities and the most likely impacted code areas.
Produce and evolve the canonical POA before implementation begins.
Check design or implementation against architecture and capability-first rules.
Check user and contributor ergonomics for commands, prompts, docs, and operator flow.
Produce realistic, tricky scenario coverage that maps back to acceptance criteria.
Select and validate the existing tests that protect already-working behavior.
Design and author new tests for changed or added behavior.
Run functional, scenario, and regression validation while respecting shared local resources.
Install and validate the actual packaged artifact in a controlled environment.
Coordinate prerelease creation, release-note updates, and PR progression.
Validate the actual published prerelease artifact for the current host before PR progression.
Enforce rebasing onto the latest develop branch and block merge-commit history before PR creation.
Post the latest prerelease link into the PR through the approved GitHub path.
Own Jira communication through ACLI rather than ad hoc external paths.
Determine whether work should stay repo-native or be treated as sync-managed.
Persist enough structure that another person or agent can resume safely.
Mirror final orchestration evidence to the configured local or AWS-backed audit destination.
Provide interim shared-memory behavior using repo and user-global folders instead of external memory services.
Provide interim code/context behavior using repo-local summaries instead of full Graphify.
Assemble stable-release lineage context distinct from branch prerelease notes.
Inventory existing sync/capability assets, providers, manifests, and update obligations before deciding whether full SDLC is needed.
Create, revise, version-update, or retire repo-managed capability assets through a lightweight asset lifecycle path.
Formalize phase slicing and restart destinations when scope or blockers outgrow a single phase.
Archive runtime-only branch artifacts, promote durable closeout memory, and prove merge hygiene through a repo-backed receipt.
